name: Scenario D: Ambiguous matter → review queue (tier 6 confidence)
description: Identity resolution cannot resolve the matter. Tier 6 gives confidence 0.0, which routes the candidate to the review queue rather than proceeding through dedup.

evidence_event.raw_text: Someone mentioned we need to file something by end of month but I'm not sure which case.

candidate_task.canonical_summary: File unspecified document by end of month
